metadata.description: Illustrative project-context for the cc-wf-studio monorepo. Hand-authored from real files to show the target shape; a real run would be produced by the ts-morph extractor.

project.name: cc-wf-studio
project.summary: pnpm monorepo for CC Workflow Studio: a VSCode extension + CLI + MCP server that let users build visual AI-agent workflows and export them as Claude Code instructions. `core` holds the shared schema, types, validators and Markdown/Mermaid generators (no fs/UI/network).

files.intent: Canonical TypeScript types for a workflow: nodes, per-node data shapes, connections, and the top-level Workflow object plus validation-rule constants.
Turns a workflow into the AI export artifact: a Mermaid flowchart plus per-node execution instructions, with provider-specific tool wording.
Human-readable Markdown view of a whole workflow, one section per node in topological order (Overview pane). NOT the AI export format.
Parses MCP tool JSON Schema into ToolParameter objects and validates concrete parameter values against the constraints.
Registers the MCP tools (get_current_workflow, get_workflow_schema, apply_workflow, update_nodes, list_available_agents, highlight_group_node) that external AI agents use to read/edit the canvas.
Source-of-truth workflow schema. Advisory instructions that steer how AI agents generate workflows (not runtime constraints); .toon is auto-generated from it.
Validates an AI-generated workflow object before it is applied to the canvas; returns structured errors.
